chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH HYDERABAD CIRCUIT. Cr. Bail Appln. No. D - 03 OF 2018. DATE ORDERS WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 217/2019. 2. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTIONS. 3. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 218/2018 4. FOR HEARING. 10.01.2018. Mr. Sartar Iqbal Panhwar, Advocate for the Applicants along with the applicants Mehdi Raza, Dost Muhammad, Imran Ali, Hossain Ali and Raees Ali Dad. ------ 1. Granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption allowed subject to all just exceptions. 4. The Applicants/accused are present alongwith their Advocate who has been heard for grant of protective bail in favour of the applicants/accused in crime No.01 of 2018, at Police Station Tando Masti Khan, registered under section 324, 395, 337-H(ii) PPC read with section 7 ATA. It is stated by the counsel for the applicants/accused that the case against the applicants/accused is false and has been registered due to enmity. He further submits that applicants/accused intend to appear/surrender before the trial Court, for seeking pre-arrest bail but the police had cordoned the premises of the Court, as such, they are unable to appear before the said Court. Serious allegations of malafides has also been alleged against the police. Without touching merits and demerits of the case, in order to enable the Applicants to appear and surrender before the trial Court, the Applicants are admitted to protective bail for seven days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Fifty thousand) each and P.R. in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. In case the Applicants fail to surrender before the trial Court within the time specified, surety furnished before this Court shall stand forfeited.

Without touching merits and demerits of the case, in order to enable the Applicants to appear and surrender before the trial Court, the Applicants are admitted to protective bail for seven days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Fifty thousand) each and P.R. in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. In case the Applicants fail to surrender before the trial Court within the time specified, surety furnished before this Court shall stand forfeited. This bail shall remain effective up to 16.01.2018 or when the applicants surrender before the trial Court whichever is the earlier. This criminal bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE A.
